source_meta.source_document: PFNA product information and sterile implant listing

systems.system_notes: Proximal femoral nailing platform for proximal femur fracture fixation including antirotation blade constructs.

trays.tray_notes: Official sterile implant listing explicitly identifies PFNA tray structure and the accompanying-information page links the PFNA surgical techniques.

components.component_notes: Official PFNA materials define the cephalomedullary nail platform for proximal femur fracture fixation.
Official sterile implant listing exposes multiple PFNA blade lengths as the core cephalic fixation element.
PFNA distal fixation and locking options are part of the nailing construct even though this pass does not expand the full screw matrix.

products.product_notes: Official sterile implant listing identifies product code 04.027.030S as a PFNA perforated blade, length 75 mm.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The sterile listing includes many additional PFNA blade lengths and related implant rows beyond the first captured example.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper expansion pass is needed to capture the full implant and screw code matrix.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction captures one explicit blade code and the core implant families only.
